response.justification: A deeply experienced full-stack engineer (~15 years) with recent, directly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus strong TypeScript/Node and AWS experience. However, the resume shows little explicit depth in the core GenAI requirements—production AI solutions over 8+ years, RAG, vector databases, Python, and multi-agent frameworks—and limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership. The candidate's strengths in software craftsmanship and breadth are real, but the GenAI specialization central to this Staff role is thin and only recently emerging.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience (~15 yrs) with strong TypeScript/Node and AWS CDK background
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via teaching, workshops, and TDD/CI advocacy
concerns: No clear 8+ years of production GenAI; AI/agent work appears recent and limited
RAG, vector databases, and Python depth not evidenced; multi-agent frameworks unmentioned
